top_signals.title: Citi Says Oil May Slump to $60 as the Hormuz Shock Fades Away
top_signals.summary: Brent oil could extend declines to $60 a barrel by year-end as disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz ease, according to Citigroup Inc., adding to a chorus of bearish outlooks for the global crude market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
top_signals.summary: Nvidia says it will give start-ups the chance to swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits under a new program aimed at AI-focused firms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kioxia ships samples of new flash memory for AI data centers
top_signals.summary: The Tokyo-based chipmaker's latest high-density 3D flash memory chips aim to better meet AI data center needs with better efficiency and transmission speeds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google loses fight against record €4.1 billion EU antitrust fine
top_signals.summary: The ruling by Europe's top court is seen as being likely to boost the bloc's crackdown on Big Tech.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
